sections.title: Fats

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. has strong seasonal appeal because could be useful for content packaging even if the nutrition fit is weaker. lighter than most nuts because this can be practically appealing to some viewers. works in both sweet and savoury uses because useful culinary flexibility.
